pages.zh: 天上有一颗小星星，一个人闪呀闪，有点孤单。
pages.en: High in the sky a little star twinkled all alone, feeling lonely.

pages.zh: 她对月亮说：「我想要一个朋友。」
pages.en: She said to the Moon, "I wish I had a friend."

pages.zh: 月亮请来许多星星，一起组成了亮亮的星座。
pages.en: The Moon gathered many stars to form a bright constellation.

pages.zh: 小星星笑了，原来朋友就在身边。晚安！
pages.en: The little star smiled — friends were right beside her. Good night!

pages.zh: 一颗小种子睡在泥土里。
pages.en: A little seed slept deep in the soil.

pages.zh: 春天来了，雨水和阳光把它叫醒。
pages.en: When spring came, rain and sunshine woke it up.

pages.zh: 小种子慢慢长出嫩芽，越长越高。
pages.en: The seed slowly grew a sprout, taller and taller.

pages.zh: 最后开出一朵美丽的花。耐心等待，就会有惊喜。
pages.en: At last it bloomed into a beautiful flower. Patience brings wonderful surprises.
